title: AIApplicationConfig - Metadata API
description: Additional prediction information related to an AI application. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

aiApplicationDeveloperName.description: Represents the AIApplication to which AIApplicationConfig belongs. Can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores. Available in API version 51.0 and later.

applicationId.description: The ID of the parent AI application.

developerName.description: Represents the name of the application config. Can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores.

insightReasonEnabled.description: When true, generates the predictors, or field values, that were used to generate the prediction value.

masterLabel.description: Label that identifies the AI application configuration throughout the Salesforce user interface.

scoringMode.description: Frequency with which the prediction scores are written back. Valid values are: Batch OnDemand Streaming
